meaning: n.[化]氧化测定(法),氧化(还原) 滴定(法)
examples: Complex formation titration, oxidimetry and precipitation titration were compared.
The ion distribution model of ZnMn ferrite was determined by XPS and oxidimetry methods.
Glycerin could be extracted from Biodiesel by extraction. And it could be analysised by Sodium Periodata oxidimetry. The accuracy of it has been proved.
